info.title: Identity Toolkit API
info.description: The Google Identity Toolkit API lets you use open standards to verify a user's identity.

post.summary: Signs up a new email and password user or anonymous user, or upgrades an anonymous user to email and password. For an admin request with a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](htt
post.description: Signs up a new email and password user or anonymous user, or upgrades an anonymous user to email and password. For an admin request with a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control), creates a new anonymous, email and password, or phone number user. An [API key](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys) is required in the request in order to identify the Google Cloud project.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The project ID of the project which the user should belong to. Specifying this field requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control). If this is not set, the target project is inferred from the scope associated to the Bearer access token.

post.summary: Looks up user accounts within a project or a tenant based on conditions in the request.
post.description: Looks up user accounts within a project or a tenant based on conditions in the request.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project to which the result is scoped.

post.summary: Creates a session cookie for the given Identity Platform ID token. The session cookie is used by the client to preserve the user's login state.
post.description: Creates a session cookie for the given Identity Platform ID token. The session cookie is used by the client to preserve the user's login state.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project that the account belongs to.

post.summary: Uploads multiple accounts into the Google Cloud project. If there is a problem uploading one or more of the accounts, the rest will be uploaded, and a list of the errors will be returned. To use this
post.description: Uploads multiple accounts into the Google Cloud project. If there is a problem uploading one or more of the accounts, the rest will be uploaded, and a list of the errors will be returned. To use this method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The Project ID of the Identity Platform project which the account belongs to.

post.summary: Looks up user accounts within a project or a tenant based on conditions in the request.
post.description: Looks up user accounts within a project or a tenant based on conditions in the request.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project to which the result is scoped.

post.summary: Deletes a user's account.
post.description: Deletes a user's account.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project which the account belongs to. Should only be specified in authenticated requests that specify local_id of an account.

post.summary: Sends an out-of-band confirmation code for an account. Requests from a authenticated request can optionally return a link including the OOB code instead of sending it.
post.description: Sends an out-of-band confirmation code for an account. Requests from a authenticated request can optionally return a link including the OOB code instead of sending it.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The Project ID of the Identity Platform project which the account belongs to. To specify this field, it requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

get.summary: Download account information for all accounts on the project in a paginated manner. To use this method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identit
get.description: Download account information for all accounts on the project in a paginated manner. To use this method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).. Furthermore, additional permissions are needed to get password hash, password salt, and password version from accounts; otherwise these fields are redacted.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The ID of the Identity Platform tenant the accounts belongs to. If not specified, accounts on the Identity Platform project are returned.

parameters.name: nextPageToken
parameters.description: The pagination token from the response of a previous request.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: If `tenant_id` is specified, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the Identity Platform tenant belongs to. Otherwise, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the accounts belong to.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return. Must be at least 1 and no greater than 1000. By default, it is 20.

post.summary: Updates account-related information for the specified user by setting specific fields or applying action codes. Requests from administrators and end users are supported.
post.description: Updates account-related information for the specified user by setting specific fields or applying action codes. Requests from administrators and end users are supported.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The project ID for the project that the account belongs to. Specifying this field requires Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions] (https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control). Requests from end users should pass an Identity Platform ID token instead.

post.summary: Gets account information for all matched accounts. For an end user request, retrieves the account of the end user. For an admin request with Google OAuth 2.0 credential, retrieves one or multiple acco
post.description: Gets account information for all matched accounts. For an end user request, retrieves the account of the end user. For an admin request with Google OAuth 2.0 credential, retrieves one or multiple account(s) with matching criteria.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the Google Cloud project that the account or the Identity Platform tenant specified by `tenant_id` belongs to. Should only be specified by authenticated requests bearing a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

post.summary: Batch deletes multiple accounts. For accounts that fail to be deleted, error info is contained in the response. The method ignores accounts that do not exist or are duplicated in the request. This met
post.description: Batch deletes multiple accounts. For accounts that fail to be deleted, error info is contained in the response. The method ignores accounts that do not exist or are duplicated in the request. This method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions] (https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: If `tenant_id` is specified, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the Identity Platform tenant belongs to. Otherwise, the ID of the Google Cloud project that accounts belong to.

post.summary: Signs up a new email and password user or anonymous user, or upgrades an anonymous user to email and password. For an admin request with a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](htt
post.description: Signs up a new email and password user or anonymous user, or upgrades an anonymous user to email and password. For an admin request with a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control), creates a new anonymous, email and password, or phone number user. An [API key](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys) is required in the request in order to identify the Google Cloud project.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The project ID of the project which the user should belong to. Specifying this field requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with the proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control). If this is not set, the target project is inferred from the scope associated to the Bearer access token.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The ID of the Identity Platform tenant to create a user under. If not set, the user will be created under the default Identity Platform project.

post.summary: Creates a session cookie for the given Identity Platform ID token. The session cookie is used by the client to preserve the user's login state.
post.description: Creates a session cookie for the given Identity Platform ID token. The session cookie is used by the client to preserve the user's login state.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project that the account belongs to.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The tenant ID of the Identity Platform tenant the account belongs to.

post.summary: Batch deletes multiple accounts. For accounts that fail to be deleted, error info is contained in the response. The method ignores accounts that do not exist or are duplicated in the request. This met
post.description: Batch deletes multiple accounts. For accounts that fail to be deleted, error info is contained in the response. The method ignores accounts that do not exist or are duplicated in the request. This method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions] (https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: If the accounts belong to an Identity Platform tenant, the ID of the tenant. If the accounts belong to a default Identity Platform project, the field is not needed.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: If `tenant_id` is specified, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the Identity Platform tenant belongs to. Otherwise, the ID of the Google Cloud project that accounts belong to.

post.summary: Gets account information for all matched accounts. For an end user request, retrieves the account of the end user. For an admin request with Google OAuth 2.0 credential, retrieves one or multiple acco
post.description: Gets account information for all matched accounts. For an end user request, retrieves the account of the end user. For an admin request with Google OAuth 2.0 credential, retrieves one or multiple account(s) with matching criteria.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the Google Cloud project that the account or the Identity Platform tenant specified by `tenant_id` belongs to. Should only be specified by authenticated requests bearing a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The ID of the tenant that the account belongs to. Should only be specified by authenticated requests from a developer.

get.summary: Download account information for all accounts on the project in a paginated manner. To use this method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identit
get.description: Download account information for all accounts on the project in a paginated manner. To use this method requires a Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions](https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control).. Furthermore, additional permissions are needed to get password hash, password salt, and password version from accounts; otherwise these fields are redacted.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: If `tenant_id` is specified, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the Identity Platform tenant belongs to. Otherwise, the ID of the Google Cloud project that the accounts belong to.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return. Must be at least 1 and no greater than 1000. By default, it is 20.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The ID of the Identity Platform tenant the accounts belongs to. If not specified, accounts on the Identity Platform project are returned.

parameters.name: nextPageToken
parameters.description: The pagination token from the response of a previous request.

post.description: Updates account-related information for the specified user by setting specific fields or applying action codes. Requests from administrators and end users are supported.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The project ID for the project that the account belongs to. Specifying this field requires Google OAuth 2.0 credential with proper [permissions] (https://cloud.google.com/identity-platform/docs/access-control). Requests from end users should pass an Identity Platform ID token instead.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The tenant ID of the Identity Platform tenant that the account belongs to. Requests from end users should pass an Identity Platform ID token rather than setting this field.

parameters.name: targetProjectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project which the account belongs to. Should only be specified in authenticated requests that specify local_id of an account.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The ID of the tenant that the account belongs to, if applicable. Only require to be specified for authenticated requests bearing a Google OAuth 2.0 credential that specify local_id of an account that belongs to an Identity Platform tenant.
